signals: OpenAI despliega GPT-5.4 integrando razonamiento avanzado y flujos agenticos en una arquitectura frontera.
Google DeepMind lanza la serie Gemini 3.1 escalando desde modelos Flash-Lite hasta Deep Think para ciencia.
Siemens introduce agentes de IA para orquestar de forma autonoma el diseño de semiconductores y PCBs.
La fabricacion en 3nm alcanza un limite fisico donde el reloj del SoC domina el consumo y el rendimiento.
Intel enfrenta una crisis estructural que cuestiona la efectividad de los subsidios estatales sin cambio cultural.
risks: Dominio de redes de reloj en 3nm como principal limitador de rendimiento y eficiencia en nuevos chips de IA.
Desalineacion potencial en la generacion masiva de codigo interno monitorizada mediante modelos avanzados.
Inutilidad de la inversion publica en manufactura de chips si no se resuelven los problemas de gestion interna.
watch: Efectividad real de GPT-5.4 Pro en la automatizacion de flujos de trabajo de nivel profesional.
Adopcion de Gemini 3 Deep Think en descubrimientos cientificos y problemas de ingenieria compleja.
Integracion de agentes de IA de Siemens en el ciclo de diseño comercial de hardware avanzado.

items.title: WEBINAR: Reclaiming Clock Margin at 3nm and Below
items.summary: At 3nm and below, clock networks have quietly become the dominant limiter of SoC power, performance, and yield. Yet most advanced-node designs still rely on abstraction-based signoff methodologies developed when voltage headroom was generous and interconnect effects were secondary. That assumption no longer holds As supply… Read More The post WEBINAR: Reclaiming Clock Margin at 3nm and Below appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: El diseño bajo 3nm requiere nuevos metodos de signoff al ser el reloj el principal factor limitante en potencia y rendimiento.

items.why: DeepMind impulsa nuevos estandares de evaluacion cognitiva para medir el progreso real hacia la AGI.

items.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning...
items.summary: GPT-5.4 Thinking and GPT-5.4 Pro are rolling out now in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 is also now available in the API and Codex. GPT-5.4 brings our advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into one frontier model. Meet Codex for Students. We're offering college students in the U.S. and Canada $100 in Codex credits. Our goal is to support students to learn by building, breaking, and fixing things. [chatgpt.com/codex/students](https://t.co/WrOtW8E8Lk) Sharing some of the work I’ve been doing at OpenAI: we now monitor 99.9% of internal coding traffic for misalignment using our most powerful models, reviewing full trajectories to catch suspicious behavior, escalate serious cases quickly, and strengthen our safeguards over time.
items.why: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.4 que unifica razonamiento, programacion y agentes en un modelo frontera de alto impacto sectorial.

items.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
items.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.
items.why: Integracion de Lyria 3 en Gemini para generacion de audio, ampliando capacidades creativas multimodales.

items.title: Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips
items.summary: A screen capture of Project Genie, an experimental interface showing a grid of circular images, many of which appear to be 360-degree views, with a large, central black globe labeled Create your own
items.why: Project Genie explora interfaces de generacion de mundos virtuales mediante prompts optimizados.

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.why: Actualizaciones en Google Translate para mejorar la comprension contextual mediante botones interactivos de IA.

items.title: Captain America: Can Elon Musk Save America’s Chip Manufacturing Industry?
items.summary: Intel has posted three consecutive years of falling revenue and an $18.76 billion loss in 2024 alone—and the U.S. government has handed it tens of billions of dollars to fix the problem. The government money isn’t fixing the real issue, which isn’t technical. It’s cultural. Intel got slow, political, and risk-averse—the… Read More The post Captain America: Can Elon Musk Save America’s Chip Manufacturing Industry? appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Discusion critica sobre el fracaso de los subsidios en Intel y la necesidad de una reforma cultural operativa.

items.title: Siemens Fuse EDA AI Agent Releases to Orchestrate Agentic Semiconductor and PCB Design
items.summary: Though terminology sometimes get fuzzy, consensus holds that an agent manages a bounded task with control through a natural language interface. An agentic orchestrator, itself an agent, manages a more complex objective requiring reasoning through multi-step actions and is responsible for orchestrating those actions. By… Read More The post Siemens Fuse EDA AI Agent Releases to Orchestrate Agentic Semiconductor and PCB Design appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: Siemens Fuse automatiza el diseño de chips mediante orquestadores agenticos, un paso clave para hardware diseñado por IA.

items.title: It’s a Sign: AI Platform for Teaching American Sign Language Aims to Bridge Communication Gaps
items.summary: American Sign Language is the third most prevalent language in the United States — but there are vastly fewer AI tools developed with ASL data than data representing the country’s most common languages, English and Spanish. NVIDIA, the American Society for Deaf Children and creative agency Hello Monday are helping close this gap with Signs, […]
items.why: NVIDIA utiliza vision artificial para cerrar la brecha de herramientas de IA en el lenguaje de señas americano.

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.why: Iniciativa de formacion masiva en IA financiada por Google para el ecosistema de talento regional.

items.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
items.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.
items.why: Mejora en generacion de imagenes rapida con consistencia de sujeto y capacidades de produccion profesional.

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: Bubble that says "Personal Intelligence" with Google G, Google Photos logo, and Gmail logo around it
items.why: Expansion de la inteligencia personal integrada en el ecosistema de aplicaciones de Google.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite optimiza la relacion costo-rendimiento para ejecucion de IA a gran escala.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
items.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.
items.why: Version Pro diseñada para tareas de alta complejidad donde el razonamiento profundo es indispensable.

items.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
items.summary: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.
items.why: Modelo especializado en razonamiento cientifico para resolver problemas avanzados de investigacion e ingenieria.
